a.xlink:title: Retrieve a card pixmap, either from cache or enqueued for loading.
Loads the pixmap based on the given size and card information.
Loads the appropriate pixmap based on the current card info.
Custom paint event that draws the enlarged card image with rounded corners.
Sets the pixmap for the widget based on a provided card.
Custom paint event that draws the card image with rounded corners.
Paints the widget, including both the card image and the text overlay.
